documents_exactly_one_owner.name: documents_exactly_one_owner
documents_exactly_one_owner.value: ("documents"."owner_type" = 'product' AND "documents"."product_id" IS NOT NULL AND "documents"."job_id" IS NULL AND "documents"."quote_id" IS NULL) OR ("documents"."owner_type" = 'job' AND "documents"."job_id" IS NOT NULL AND "documents"."product_id" IS NULL AND "documents"."quote_id" IS NULL) OR ("documents"."owner_type" = 'quote' AND "documents"."quote_id" IS NOT NULL AND "documents"."product_id" IS NULL AND "documents"."job_id" IS NULL)

feedback_subject_exactly_one.name: feedback_subject_exactly_one
feedback_subject_exactly_one.value:
("feedback"."subject_type" = 'quote' AND "feedback"."quote_id" IS NOT NULL AND "feedback"."job_id" IS NULL)
        OR ("feedback"."subject_type" = 'job' AND "feedback"."job_id" IS NOT NULL AND "feedback"."quote_id" IS NULL)

job_slot_work_job_required_idle_job_forb.name: job_slot_work_job_required_idle_job_forbidden
job_slot_work_job_required_idle_job_forb.value: ("job_slot"."kind" = 'work' AND "job_slot"."job_id" IS NOT NULL) OR ("job_slot"."kind" = 'idle' AND "job_slot"."job_id" IS NULL)

job_product_serial_shape.name: job_product_serial_shape
job_product_serial_shape.value:
("job"."product_id" is not null
            and "job"."product_serial_number" is not null
            and "job"."product_serial_prefix" is not null
            and "job"."product_serial_year" is not null
            and "job"."product_serial_sequence" is not null)
        or ("job"."product_id" is null
            and "job"."product_serial_number" is null
            and "job"."product_serial_prefix" is null
            and "job"."product_serial_year" is null
            and "job"."product_serial_sequence" is null)

product_assemblies_price_kind_check.name: product_assemblies_price_kind_check
product_assemblies_price_kind_check.value: ("product_assemblies"."kind" = 'standard' AND "product_assemblies"."price" IS NULL) OR ("product_assemblies"."kind" = 'optional' AND "product_assemblies"."price" IS NOT NULL)

quote_hourly_rate_shape.name: quote_hourly_rate_shape

quote_kind_shape.name: quote_kind_shape
